name: vdm-hooks
description: Claude Code hooks for the Van Damme-o-Matic credential switcher. Reports session boundaries, sub-agent fan-out, prompt context, compaction events, worktree lifecycle, and (opt-in) per-tool attribution to the local vdm dashboard. Companion to the dashboard.mjs daemon — see https://github.com/Emasoft/claude-acct-switcher.
